name: Hidden Fairway Golf Club
about: Hidden Fairway Golf Club is a private indoor golf simulator facility located in Tampa, FL. The venue features a single 15-foot-wide Uneekor Eye X02 simulator in a 1,800 square foot space, offering a private and modern golfing experience. Members and guests can book sessions in one to two-hour increments, with a focus on privacy and high technology, including Uneekor AI and Swing Optix for detailed swing analysis.
why_golfers_like_it: Dedicated private simulator for an uninterrupted experience
Premium Uneekor Eye X02 launch monitor with high accuracy
200+ frames per second swing analysis with Swing Optix

food_and_drink.notes: You may bring your own food. Please clean up and keep all food behind the safety line.
No information on alcohol service. BYOB status unclear.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The provided information does not explicitly state whether customers need to bring their own clubs. It is recommended to contact the venue directly for clarification.

faq.question: Can I bring food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, you may bring your own food and drinks. We ask that you clean up afterwards and keep all food and drinks behind the safety line.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: The time required to play 18 holes depends on the number of people in your group. 1 Person can play a round in 1 hour, 2 People in 2 hours, 3 People in 3 hours, and 4 people in 4 hours.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Children under the age of 16 can use the simulators, however, they must be accompanied by an adult at all times.
